stemHtml: In error the V1 used on a particular take-off exceeds the correct value of V1. If an engine fails at a speed immediately above the correct value of V1 then...

options.a: the accelerate stop distance may exceed the accelerate stop distance available.
options.b: the one engine inoperative take-off distance may exceed the take-off distance available.
options.c: the increased airspeed may lead to over&rotation.
options.d: V<sub>1</sub> may be too high resulting in the initial climb performance decreasing.
